window_summary: This window tracks the recent rust-lang/rust release stream from version 1.75.0 through 1.96.0, including minor and patch releases. chunks.memory_unit_text: In the rust-lang/rust release 1.75.0, the project stabilizes async fn and return-position impl Trait in traits, allows function pointer signatures containing &mut T in const contexts, and matches usize/isize exhaustively with half-open ranges. The compiler reworks negative coherence, bumps COINDUCTIVE_OVERLAP_IN_COHERENCE to deny, and adds several tier 3 targets. Libraries override Waker::clone_from, implement BufRead for VecDeque<u8>, and support sub-millisecond sleep on Windows. Stabilized APIs include Atomic*::from_ptr, FileTimes, and IpAddr::to_canonical.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the rust-lang/rust release 1.76.0, the language documents Rust ABI compatibility between various types and guarantees that char and u32 are ABI-compatible. The compiler adds a lint for pinned #[must_use] pointers, fixes soundness issues with packed structs, and adds tier 3 targets including aarch64-apple-watchos.
